_comment: Prior interactive-web / browser-game builds for the Interactive Experiences Studio. Use these as reference proof points and comparable deals when the RFP is for a game or interactive web experience (NOT the data-platform past-wins.json).

comparable_builds.engagement: "Spin-to-Win" real-time multiplayer promo game embedded on the brand homepage
comparable_builds.won_on: Hit 100% uptime through the ad window on pre-warmed capacity; sub-200ms sync
comparable_builds.notes: Livestream spike playbook: pre-warm to 1.5x expected peak, game-day runbook, war-room.

comparable_builds.engagement: Browser chess + backgammon suite with shareable-link multiplayer and 3-tier AI
comparable_builds.won_on: Server-authoritative rules engine + reconnection; beat an indie studio on reliability
comparable_builds.notes: Reusable turn-based rules engine + minimax AI harness — directly reusable for checkers.

comparable_builds.engagement: Accessible public-facing interactive map + mini-game, WCAG 2.2 AA
comparable_builds.won_on: Full keyboard nav + colorblind-safe palettes shipped as first-class, not afterthought
comparable_builds.notes: Accessibility reference: keyboard-navigable interactive board, tested CVD-safe palettes.
